Disclaimer

Last updated: July 23, 2026

Web of Origins is an independent educational platform dedicated to mapping material flows, supply chains, and associated environmental and industrial impacts. The content on this website—including data visualizations, node graphs, search results, articles, and references—is provided for informational and exploratory purposes only.

Accuracy of Information

While we strive to compile data from credible public sources and maintain accuracy, we do not guarantee the completeness, timeliness, or absolute correctness of any information presented. The database and visualizations are living works in progress and may contain errors, omissions, or outdated details. Users should cross-verify critical information with primary sources before making decisions.

No Professional advice

Nothing on this site constitutes professional, medical, legal, financial, environmental, or regulatory advice. The platform is not a substitute for expert consultation. Reliance on any information from Web of Origins is strictly at your own risk.

Data Sources and Limitations

  • Data is aggregated from publicly available research, industry reports, government statistics, and other open sources.

  • Visual connections and impact mappings represent simplified relationships and do not capture every nuance of complex global supply chains.

  • Country and industry statistics reflect general trends and may vary by methodology and reporting period.

Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Web of Origins, its contributors, developers, and affiliates disclaim all liability for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of this website or reliance on its content.

We are not responsible for:
• Decisions made based on site information
• Third-party websites linked from this platform
• Any technical issues, data loss, or interruptions
